news.title: Stock futures mixed as Middle East tensions escalate; traders await earnings and inflation data: Live updates

news.title: U.S. targets Iranian military assets in another round of strikes as Tehran hits Gulf states
news.summary: The U.S. has completed a third consecutive night of strikes against Iran, as Tehran targets U.S. military facilities in the region.

news.title: China exports in June rise at fastest pace since 2021 as AI boom, tariff rush lift trade
news.summary: China's exports to the U.S. jumped around 14% last month while imports grew 26%, according to CNBC calculation of the official data.

news.title: Taiwan's second-largest chipmaker starts mass production in Singapore; Citi sees improving outlook
news.summary: Taiwan’s UMC has kicked off mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility amid positive Citi forecast.

news.title: 'Nobody underwrote for that': Private credit faces a key test as higher rates squeeze borrowers
news.summary: Private credit is facing a new pressure point from elevated rates, which could hit under-pressure borrowers.

news.title: Trump's Hormuz toll plans bring oil supply risks back in spotlight

news.title: AI agents could change how software companies get paid, Sierra co-founder says
news.summary: AI agents are designed to do more than answer questions. They are meant to complete tasks. Sierra co-founder Clay Bavor joins CNBC's Arjun Kharpal to discuss how AI agents are moving from demos into real business workflows, especially in customer service, sales and support.

news.title: Singapore's economy expands 5.7% in the second quarter, beating expectations
news.summary: The growth figure was higher than the 5.5% expected, but lower than the revised 6.3% in the first quarter.

news.title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.

news.title: Sandisk’s stock is plunging, but some analysts are getting even more bullish
news.summary: One new stock-price target implies nearly 85% upside from current levels.

news.title: 'Listing is a must': Chinese humanoid startups are rushing to launch IPOs

news.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session

news.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
news.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

news.title: The Monthly Check Trap: How JEPQ’s Covered-Call Strategy Left Investors 12.57% Behind QQQ in Just Five Years
news.summary: JEPQ's monthly payouts look generous until you add up what the covered-call strategy, the expense ratio, and the tax bill quietly take back. There are actually three separate costs eating into your returns, and most investors only notice one.

news.title: Japan’s bond market is back in play after decades in the wilderness
news.summary: JGBs have been selling off amid policy normalization and concerns over Tokyo's spending plans, but experts say that they deserve another look from investors.

news.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
news.summary: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

news.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Betting on Shenzhen over Silicon Valley
news.summary: The coastal Chinese city of Shenzhen has become a hub for tech hardware that U.S. firms can't ignore.

news.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
news.summary: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.
